parameters.query:
USE WAREHOUSE monitor_wh;
USE DATABASE snowpipe_monitor_demo;
USE SCHEMA raw;

SELECT 
  file_name,
  status,
  error_count,
  first_error_message,
  last_load_time,
  COALESCE(pipe_name, 'MANUAL_LOAD') as pipe_name 
FROM TABLE(INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COPY_HISTORY(
  TABLE_NAME => 'staging_call_logs',
  START_TIME => DATEADD(days, -1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
)) 
WHERE status = 'LOAD_FAILED'
ORDER BY last_load_time DESC

USE WAREHOUSE monitor_wh;
USE DATABASE snowpipe_monitor_demo;
USE SCHEMA raw;

SELECT 
  UPPER(pipe_name) as PIPE_NAME,
  UPPER(file_name) as FILE_NAME,
  COALESCE(MAX(retry_count), 0) as RETRY_COUNT,
  MAX(failure_time) as LAST_RETRY_TIME
FROM snowpipe_failure_logs
WHERE failure_time > DATEADD(days, -1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
GROUP BY UPPER(pipe_name), UPPER(file_name)
